name: Destryn Table Lamp - 18 Inch Height - TBL3014 - Teal - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the vibrant allure of the DESTRYN TABLE LAMP. Crafted with artistry, this lamp features a stunning teal shade, artfully rendered in paper mache that emanates an inviting glow. The sturdy iron base provides a solid foundation with a sleek design that complements any room's decor. Ideal for those who appreciate aesthetically pleasing yet functional design elements in their home or office. Add a pop of color to your space with the eco-friendly and creatively designed DESTRYN TABLE LAMP.
